articles.title: Switzerland’s Largest Bank Tests Tokenized Gold Product on Ethereum Layer-2 ZKsync
articles.description: Union Bank of Switzerland (UBS), the largest bank in Switzerland, is testing a tokenized gold product on Ethereum (ETH) layer-2 scaling solution ZKsync (ZK). In a new thread on the social media platform X, the developers behind ZKsync say that UBS is testing out its tokenized gold investment products on the blockchain as a means […] The post Switzerland’s Largest Bank Tests Tokenized Gold...

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Rejects Bitcoin Allocation Rule, Stays Committed to Ethereum
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin dismissed calls to allocate 10% of portfolios to Bitcoin and reaffirmed his commitment to Ethereum over diversification.

articles.title: El Salvador Accelerates Bitcoin Purchases Despite IMF Agreement
articles.description: El Salvador has continued adding to its Bitcoin holdings, recently purchasing two more BTC on February 1. The post El Salvador Accelerates Bitcoin Purchases Despite IMF Agreement appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Race for Bitcoin Reserves: US Makes a Move
articles.description: Several US states are proposing laws to create strategic reserves in Bitcoin, with the support of political leaders and industry companies.
